title: The Clients
description: Client side mods you should always use. Supports 1.21.8 (1.21.9 coming soon!)
body:
# Heres what The Clients does!

The Clients trys to have the best client side mods you can play on any server or client while not changing any vanilla mechanics, only improving the vanilla experience. The Features are shaders, fullbright, custom capes, a better F3 menu, better looking clouds, a lot of optimization features, dynamic lighting, 3D skin layers, letting you see light levels, zooming, a minimap, and much more! Thank you to [Shulkercraft](https://www.youtube.com/@Shulkercraft) for making a [video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GvER-7nKdGM) to inspire this modpack **_(make sure to subscribe to his channel)_**. Also the Icon was inspired by [Modmenu's](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) banner, so thank you to Modmenu.
